sub: The Evidence I Was Looking For
body:
I hid data on government servers. Classified intel
that proves Nexus's involvement with the NSA.
Project Chimera, C4I Blueprint, NSA Backdoor Vault —
they're all there. Use INTEL to see what you've stolen,
then SELLINTEL to sell it on the black market.
Money is needed to upgrade your hardware.
The more power you have, the deeper you can go.
